sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28182" key="doulomici/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δουλο-μιξία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28182.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consorting with slaves,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9022.tlg001:467" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">467</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
